scripts.generate-llms: node scripts/generate-llms.mjs && claude --allowedTools Read -p 'Read the file public/llms-full.txt. Generate a summary index following the llms.txt spec format (# Title, > Description, then ## Sections with bullet-point links and one-line descriptions). Only use information present in the source file. Never invent or embellish. Group sections logically. Output ONLY the raw llms.txt content — no introductory text, no commentary, no explanations, no markdown fences. Start directly with the # title line.' > public/llms-raw.txt && node scripts/cleanup-llms-raw.mjs && git rev-parse HEAD > .llms-generation
